## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7) {#trm1.4.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-descent-pi7 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are 0.8 seconds per flight lower in Luxembourg. Luxembourg (ELLX) has an average time flown level of 148.4 seconds per flight during descent.
